productDisplayName: Nike Men Court Majestic Black Sports Shoes
description: Designed with a low-top silhouette for the tennis player, the nike Court Majestic lives true to its name and offers a stylish look with exemplary comfort. With a cushioned sockliner and a grippy outsole, this shoe also doubles as a perfect casual sneaker.UpperSynthetic leather upper with nike swoosh overlays on either side of the midfoot for styleLacing system for a snug, customised FitCushioned tongue and collar for snug comfortPadded footbed for enhanced cushioning and impact protectionMidsolePhylon midsole for absolute shock absorption and lightweight comfortOutsoleTPR outsole with herringbone grooves for optimal traction Shoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
